body:
Dear Mr. Sultan,

We took good note of your email and acknowledge receipt of Milenas CV.

She has a very limited experience in the hospitality industry however we will do our utmost to find a suitable position that would benefit all of us.

Our HR department will be in touch with her shortly

Best regards,

Jean-François

Together we can…!

Jean-François Laurent | General Manager
Anantara The Palm Dubai Resort
Executive Office, P.O. Box 71607, East Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE
T: + 971 (0) 4 567 8000 | E: jflaurent@anantara.com<mailto:jflaurent@anantara.com>
